title: VideoSnippet
description: Basic details about a video, including its title, description, tags, and category.

publishedAt.description: The date and time when the video was published.

channelId.description: The ID of the YouTube channel that published the video.

description.example: A sample description for this resource.

thumbnails.description: A map of thumbnail images associated with the video.

url.description: The URL of the thumbnail image.

channelTitle.description: The channel title of the YouTube channel that published the video.

tags.description: A list of keyword tags associated with the video.

categoryId.description: The YouTube video category associated with the video.

liveBroadcastContent.description: Indicates if the video is an upcoming/active live broadcast.

defaultLanguage.description: The language of the text in the video resource's snippet.title and snippet.description properties.

localized.description: The snippet.localized object contains either a localized title and description for the video or the title in the default language.
